headline: Goldman Sachs Slashes Best Buy (BBY) PT to $59, Warns of Volume and Pricing Risks
summary: Best Buy Co., Inc. (NYSE:BBY) is included among the 14 Value Stocks with Highest Dividends. On April 13, Goldman Sachs analyst Kate McShane double-downgraded Best Buy Co., Inc. (NYSE:BBY) to Sell from Buy. It also reduced the price target to $59 from $76. The firm sees risk to sales following the Q1 report as higher […]

headline: How Goldman’s Margin Concerns And Rising AI Laptop Competition At Best Buy (BBY) Has Changed Its Investment Story
summary: Earlier this month, Goldman Sachs downgraded Best Buy to Sell, citing concerns about margin pressure, softer demand in key electronics and appliance categories, and higher memory costs feeding into computer and laptop prices. At the same time, ASUS expanded retail availability of its AI-powered TUF Gaming A14 laptop beyond Best Buy, underscoring intensifying competition in higher-end computing products that Best Buy sells. Next, we’ll examine how Goldman’s margin worries and softer category...
